rationale: The proposed change to the homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no relation to Educ. Code §39.023, which governs adoption and administration of student assessment instruments. No conflict exists.
quote: In creating and implementing the instructionally supportive assessment program under Section 39.022, the agency shall adopt or develop appropriate beginning-of-year, middle-of-year, and end-of-year assessment instruments designed to assess essential knowledge and skills in reading language arts, mathematics, social studies, and science.
_note: Educ. Code §39.023 concerns student assessment instruments and is unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions. No conflict identified.
